title: Korean-Style Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious Korean-inspired dish made with marinated chicken and stir-fried vegetables. Serve with rice or noodles for a satisfying meal.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together chili flakes, garlic, soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar. Add the chicken and toss to coat. Let marinate for at least 15 minutes.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
3. Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
4. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
6. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
7. Stir-fry the chicken in the skillet for 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
8. Add the green onions to the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 1 minute.
9. Serve the chicken and vegetables hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
10. Cook rice or noodles according to package instructions.
